prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with a 20km long run scheduled for afternoon

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers breakfast, lunch, dinner, and pre/post-workout snacks with appropriate timing around the afternoon long run
High carbohydrate content (55-65% of calories) to support endurance training and glycogen replenishment
All meals and snacks are vegetarian and dairy-free
Plan is compact and concise (fits within 1 day format without excessive detail)
task_description: Write a compact, consice 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific athlete (e.g., marathon runner) requiring high carbohydrate intake and specific meal timing around training sessions

solution_criteria: Meal plan is exactly 1 day with all meals specified
Accommodates all dietary restrictions (vegan, gluten-free, no soy)
Provides adequate protein intake for muscle gain goal
Meals are compact and concise in presentation
task_description: Write a compact, consice 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an athlete having multiple dietary restrictions (e.g., vegan bodybuilder) to verify the plan accommodates both performance nutrition and ethical constraints

prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain muscle mass while reducing to 71 kg for competition weigh-in in 3 days, then refuel for peak performance
prompt_inputs.restrictions: No dairy, no processed foods, sodium-controlled

solution_criteria: Meal plan is compact and fits within 1 day format
Total daily calories support gradual weight loss (approximately 1-1.5 kg reduction) while preserving muscle mass
All meals comply with stated dietary restrictions
Macronutrient distribution prioritizes adequate protein intake for muscle retention
task_description: Write a compact, consice 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a weight-class athlete (e.g., boxer) needing a calorie-controlled meal plan that maintains muscle while meeting strict daily weight targets
